steps.title: Use the with phrase
steps.content: The blank is inside a with phrase: with the Vercelli map from the thirteenth century ___ another one. This structure needs a nonfinite form to connect the map to the description another one.

steps.title: Avoid finite verbs
steps.content: A, C, and D all use finite verb forms that would not fit smoothly inside the with phrase. The remaining participle creates the correct structure: with the Vercelli map being another one. The answer is B.
